statement.en: Advancing equity, diversity, and inclusion in arthritis research : a mixed-methods exploration of strategies for improvement and integration
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Document is a provisional academic thesis (2026 date, embargo active) containing empirical mixed-methods research on equity/diversity/inclusion in arthritis research. The abstract is withheld pending embargo expiration, making direct evaluation of claims impossible. The work is under validation and not yet in final form.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 多様な声の調和が、排除された経験の弧を埋める。
